items.name_en: 🌟🌟🌟CHANEL 22bag mini	It's so cool~ it's my favorite, just browsing... completely want to buy a bag, eye-catching, must grab it haha! The SA was very nice. Chanel patent calfskin paired with vintage hardware, quilted, the mini 22bag is more refined than the larger size. The chain design is so Coco, double chains ⛓➕ leather strap chains ⛓, full of details. Tighten and open the bag using the two short leather chains on the front, the two long shoulder straps on the back are purely for carrying.

25C Spring New Logo Tote Backpack Crossbody Calfskin with Gold Metal, giving off a fresh and fashionable vibe at a glance!
With its classic design, every detail reveals
refinement and elegance. Whether it's the iconic quilted pattern or the double C logo, it's irresistible. Whether for formal occasions or casual outings, it matches perfectly. Fans, go for it!
Style AP4406
Size 14-18-3

Satisfies different needs

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New ANDIAMO Tote. This denim woven bag perfectly blends retro and trendy! Handwoven denim, every thread carries craftsmanship, and the color-block design breaks the mold. Not only is the capacity impressive, but it also adds a touch of fun and cuteness, easily holding various styles. Exquisite metal accessories shine on the ruggedness of the denim, combining toughness with softness. Denim naturally brings a youthful and energetic vibe, giving a feeling of both retro classicism and relaxed freedom. During the weaving process, the bag is hand-woven with denim through small gaps into the leather surface, a truly exquisite technique! The capacity is beyond doubt, it can fit an umbrella and a water bottle!

items.name_en: 【💯Five Grid New Sun God White】Lᴀᴅʏ Embroidered Diana Bag. The "Cʜʀɪsᴛɪᴀɴ Dɪᴏʀ" logo is stylish and feminine. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a large detachable double-sided embroidered shoulder strap, allowing you to choose your carrying style freely. Detachable double-sided embroidered wide strap, internal zip pocket and patch pocket. Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, easily paired with other embroidered straps.

【💯Five Grid New Sun God Blue】Lᴀᴅʏ Embroidered Diana Bag. The "Cʜʀɪsᴛɪᴀɴ Dɪᴏʀ" logo is stylish and feminine. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a large detachable double-sided embroidered shoulder strap, allowing you to choose your carrying style freely. Detachable double-sided embroidered wide strap, internal zip pocket and patch pocket. Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, easily paired with other embroidered straps.
Size: 24 cm x 20 cm x 11 cm
